top_signals.title: Congo expands Ebola testing as outbreak’s real scale eludes officials
top_signals.summary: The number of confirmed cases in the country has climbed to 260 as global health organizations warn of the risk of further spread.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SoftBank dethrones Toyota as Japan's most valuable company
Commission approves €9 billion Spanish capacity mechanism for security of electricity supply
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 29 May 2026 The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €9 billion capacity mechanism for electricity supply for Spain. This aid measure aims to ensure that there is sufficient capacity to produce, store or flexibly consume electricity and that electricity production meets the expected demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
